testcase.name: To verify login functionality with invalid credentials - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on the Locate360 login page...............................passed When The user enters valid username "ragu.kiaq@gmail.com" and password "Ragu@123".passed And The user clicks the login button........................................passed When The user enters invalid username "admin@wrong.com" and password "Admin123".passed Then The user should see an error message "Invalid credentials".............passed

testcase.name: To verify login functionality with invalid credentials - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given The user is on the Locate360 login page...............................passed When The user enters valid username "ragu.kiaq@gmail.com" and password "Ragu@123".passed And The user clicks the login button........................................passed When The user enters invalid username "admin@locate360.com" and password "WrongPass123".passed Then The user should see an error message "Invalid credentials".............passed
